pages.title: Kitty Match 3 puzzle game
pages.description:
Match and swap colorful tiles to clear levels in this charming puzzle setting. Players tackle various grid layouts by creating chains of three or more identical pieces, triggering cascading combos to reach target scores or remove obstacles. Progression involves unlocking new puzzles with increasing complexity, encouraging strategic tile management to complete challenges efficiently.

Key Features

• Tile swapping chain mechanics  
• Combo-based score system  
• Level unlocking progression  
• Time-limited puzzle modes  
• Vibrant casual puzzle visuals
